title: Senior Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Patanjali Ayurved
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
